Terms of Service

Effective Date: April 14, 2026

These Terms govern your use of the SuppTime iOS app. By using the app, you agree to these Terms.

1. License & Use

We grant you a personal, non-exclusive license. You agree not to reverse-engineer or circumvent premium checks.

2. Free Tier & Premium

The free tier allows 3 active supplements. Premium unlocks unlimited features via Apple StoreKit.

3. Medical Disclaimer

SuppTime is an organizational tool. Never disregard professional medical advice because of information in the app.

4. Accuracy

The database is compiled from public research. We make no warranty that the information is complete or accurate.

5. Data & Liability

Your data is stored locally. We are not liable for data loss. The app is provided 'as is' without warranties.

6. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Turkey.

7. Contact

Questions? Contact veyselkurnaz@icloud.com

Health & Safety Notice

Supplements are not strictly regulated. Always read product labels and seek professional guidance.

We use cookies to analyze traffic and improve your experience.
